title: ornithoxanthum liotardii
intro: Ornithoxanthum liotardii, also known as Liatris liotardii, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is a flowering plant native to the United States. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, to promote health benefits including reduced inflammation and improved immune function.
